title: Delete App Version
content:
# Delete App Version

Permanently one version of an App in the App Registry. All other versions of an App will remain unaffected. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /appregistry/{app_name}/versions/{app_version}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.deprecated_app_registry.deleteLegacyAppVersion()
print(response)

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: App Registry App key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: app_version
parameters.description: Version number of the App in the App Registry to delete.
